articles.title: Newly discovered PamStealer isn't your typical macOS malware
articles.content: The discovery underscores the increased effort being poured into Mac infostealers.
articles.titleZh: 新发现的PamStealer不是典型的macOS恶意软件
articles.contentZh: 这一发现凸显了加大对Mac信息窃取者的投入。

articles.title: T-Mobile moving tens of thousands of virtual machines off VMware amid lawsuit
articles.content: T-Mobile wants Broadcom to keep supporting its VMware perpetual licenses.
articles.titleZh: T-Mobile在诉讼中将数万台虚拟机从VMware中移除
articles.contentZh: T-Mobile希望Broadcom继续支持其VMware永久许可证。

articles.title: New attack provides one more reason why AI browsers are a bad idea
articles.content: Telling an LLM that 2 + 2 = 5 is enough to make it follow forbidden instructions.
articles.titleZh: 新攻击为人工智能浏览器是一个坏主意提供了另一个原因
articles.contentZh: 告诉LLM 2 + 2 = 5足以使其遵循禁止的指示。

articles.title: US offers $10 million for info on group behind Signal and WhatsApp hacking spree
articles.content: Operation by two Russia-state groups has been ongoing since at least March.
articles.titleZh: 美国提供1000万美元用于获取Signal和WhatsApp黑客狂欢背后的团队信息
articles.contentZh: 至少自3月以来，两个俄罗斯国家集团的行动一直在进行。

articles.title: Meta’s glasses will turn off the camera if you tamper with the privacy light
articles.content: Amid public backlash over its smart glasses, Meta announced that it will be updating its glasses with a new feature that will disable the camera when it detects that someone has tampered with or destroyed the glasses' privacy LED light. The update is meant to address modders who have taken actions such as physically drilling […]
articles.titleZh: 如果您篡改隐私灯， Meta的眼镜将关闭摄像头
articles.contentZh: 在公众对其智能眼镜的强烈反对中， Meta宣布将更新其眼镜的一项新功能，该功能将在检测到有人篡改或破坏了眼镜的隐私LED灯时禁用摄像头。此次更新旨在解决已采取物理钻孔[…]等行动的改装商

articles.title: Of course viewers are giving up on Netflix shows
articles.content: Even though Netflix is the world's most popular paid streaming service, the company has been struggling to keep viewers watching its series after their first seasons. Beef - the streamer's anthology about people locked in feuds - lost 70 percent of its viewership when it returned earlier this year. There seems to be some confusion […]
articles.titleZh: 当然，观众正在放弃Netflix节目
articles.contentZh: 尽管Netflix是世界上最受欢迎的付费流媒体服务，但该公司在第一季之后一直在努力让观众观看其系列节目。牛肉-主播关于人们陷入不和的选集-在今年早些时候回归时失去了70 ％的收视率。似乎有一些混淆[…]
